certification_name: B2 First for Schools and B2 First
exam_format: Paper-based or computer-based; Reading, Writing, Listening, Speaking components
exam_price_notes: Price varies by country and test centre. Typically $170-$280 globally.

testing_centers.notes: Exam centres can be found through the 'Find an exam centre' link.

target_audience: Learners who have the language skills to live and work in an English-speaking country or study on courses taught in English
recommended_experience: Between B1 Preliminary for Schools or B1 Preliminary and C1 Advanced

prerequisites.description: Between B1 Preliminary for Schools or B1 Preliminary and C1 Advanced

objectives.title: Communicate effectively face-to-face, expressing opinions and presenting arguments
Write clear, detailed English, expressing opinions and explaining the advantages and disadvantages of different points of view
Write emails / letters, articles, reviews and other types of text

aliases: b2 first for schools and b2 first
